infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Almohassib uses the camera to capture invoices and receipts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Almohassib uses your photo library to import financial documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Almohassib can save processed document previews when needed.

plugins.cameraPermission: Almohassib needs camera access to scan accounting documents.
plugins.photosPermission: Almohassib needs photo library access to import accounting documents.
